MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-02-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES' PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARDS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS TRAINING TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL CARPENTERS LOCAL UNION #22 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EURO CONSTRUCTION, INC. $144,991.32 PRINCIPAL, $1,713.25 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,123.69 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $147,828.26, SEE SCANNED DOC

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Awards
Off Calendar Jun-02-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES' PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARDS is granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189
